stdout:
create_workspace_session

Family
  Workspace Session

Description
  Create a runtime workspace session with finalize policy no_op: the session lives until destroy_workspace_session. When network profile is omitted, the runtime creates a shared-network workspace.

Usage
  sandbox-cli runtime create_workspace_session [--network-profile PROFILE]

Arguments
  --network-profile string optional
    Network profile: 'shared' joins the host network namespace (still isolated in mount/pid/user) or 'isolated' uses a dedicated network namespace. Defaults to 'shared' when omitted.


Examples
  sandbox-cli runtime create_workspace_session
  sandbox-cli runtime create_workspace_session --network-profile shared
  sandbox-cli runtime create_workspace_session --network-profile isolated

Related Operations
  destroy_workspace_session
  exec_command
